strengths: Combo system tracks maxCombo separately from live comboCount — correct peak-performance scoring
All 3 difficulty axes tiered: time [12,10,8,7]s, speed [40,50,60,70]px/s, spawn [0.6,0.5,0.4,0.35]s
SFX binary feedback (unlock/lose) matches negotiation framing semantically
kbFocusIdx clamping after pick is defensive
4 axes tiered: totalRounds, roundTime, hitRadius, decoyCount
roundTransition buffer prevents accidental input on round boundaries
canvas tabIndex=0 with explicit focus call
concerns: MEDIUM: onKeyDown always registers hit — no timing/hitRadius validation. Keyboard trivializes tier 3 QTE.

top3_remaining_issues.issue: pairCount and grid dimensions hardcoded readonly — flat difficulty across all tiers
top3_remaining_issues.recommendation: tieredValue([6,7,8,8]) for pairCount; 3x4 grid at 6 pairs, 4x4 at 7-8. RUNE_SET ceiling = 8.

top3_remaining_issues.issue: Balance percentage rendered only via ctx.fillText — no aria-live DOM element
top3_remaining_issues.recommendation: Add <div id='mg-eq-status' aria-live='polite' aria-atomic='true'> in setup(). Feed from setInterval.

top3_remaining_issues.issue: Keyboard always-hit in onKeyDown bypasses timing/hitRadius — trivializes QTE at tier 3
top3_remaining_issues.recommendation: Add guard: confirm only if roundElapsed > roundTime * 0.15
